description_long: This is a visually striking cake composed of three round sections arranged in a clover or Mickey Mouse-like shape, each covered in vibrant pink buttercream rosettes. The cake sits atop a rectangular silver tray, with piped black writing and a small black bow accent on the central section. The rosettes are densely piped, giving the cake a lush, floral texture, and the overall appearance is festive and celebratory. The writing on the tray reads 'Happy Birthday Knowelle & Knowledge,' indicating it is a birthday cake. The cake appears to be of moderate size, suitable for a small gathering, and the surface is glossy from the buttercream. The tray is bordered with a scalloped edge, adding a touch of elegance to the presentation.
description: A pink, rosette-decorated birthday cake with three round sections, displayed on a silver tray with piped writing and a black bow accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three round pink rosette-covered sections and the black bow, with the writing partially visible at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cake and the arrangement of the three sections, with the writing more visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the piped 'Happy Birthday Knowelle & Knowledge' message clearly visible and the rosette texture prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cake's layered structure and the writing along the left edge of the tray.
